scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --workspace=server run dev" "npm --workspace=client run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --workspace=server run dev" "npm --workspace=client run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:types && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --workspace=server run build" "npm --workspace=client run build"
